Whether you're dealing with wasps near Eagle Rock Reservation or in downtown West Orange, we respond quickly to protect your property.

faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in West Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: Wasp removal services in West Orange typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size and location of the nest, accessibility, and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in West Orange?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day wasp removal services throughout West Orange, NJ. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, though larger or hard-to-reach nests may require additional time. We prioritize emergency situations where wasps pose immediate danger.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in West Orange?
faqs.answer: West Orange commonly sees yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. Yellow jackets often nest in ground cavities or wall voids, while paper wasps build exposed nests under eaves and porches. Our technicians are trained to identify and safely remove all wasp species found in Essex County.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our wasp removal methods prioritize safety for your family and pets. We use targeted treatments and professional-grade equipment to eliminate wasps while minimizing environmental impact. Our technicians provide clear instructions for any necessary precautions during and after treatment.
